_comment: 去識別化模擬病例 / De-identified SIMULATED case for demo & testing only. NOT a real patient. No name, MRN, DOB, or identifying information.
tumor_location: right cerebral hemisphere, frontal lobe (supratentorial, non-midline)
imaging_description: MRI: a heterogeneously enhancing right frontal lobe mass with surrounding vasogenic edema, central necrosis, and mild mass effect on the right lateral ventricle. No midline/brainstem involvement. No leptomeningeal spread on current sequences.

molecular_markers.note: Molecular workup complete. Profile consistent with pediatric-type high-grade glioma, IDH-wildtype, H3-wildtype.

pathology: anaplastic astrocytoma (WHO grade 3); pediatric-type diffuse high-grade glioma, IDH-wildtype, H3-wildtype (biopsy confirmed)
previous_treatment: diagnostic biopsy completed; no resection or adjuvant therapy yet
family_question: Is this tumor operable, and what treatment options give the best chance while protecting our child's movement and speech?
deidentification_note: No patient name, MRN, or date of birth included. This is a synthetic demo case for testing only.
